series_metadata.series_description: Quarterly financial statements for all Ohio based insurance companies and Foreign companies. Includes the signed jurat page and the actuarial certification.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain hard copy until image; then destroy hard copy. Retain image 10 years; then erase. ; Electronic: Retain hard copy until image; then destroy hard copy. Retain image 10 years; then erase., Paper: Wastepaper ; Electronic: Erase
